name: ttrpg-engine-dnd starter pack
attribution: Portions of this content pack are derived from the Dungeons & Dragons System Reference Document 5.2, copyright Wizards of the Coast LLC, used under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0). The mechanical encodings are this package's own implementation. See docs/content-attribution.md for an item-by-item audit.

effects.prompt: Choose two academic skills to gain proficiency in.
Choose two skills you are proficient in to gain Expertise.
Choose two more skills you are proficient in to gain Expertise.

effects.description: You and allies within 10 ft add your CHA modifier (min +1) to saving throws.
You and allies within 10 ft can't be Frightened.
You and allies within 30 ft add your CHA modifier (min +1) to saving throws.
You and allies within 30 ft can't be Frightened.

effects.prompt: Choose Divine Strike (weapon hits gain +1d8 radiant once per turn) or Potent Spellcasting (cantrip damage gains your WIS modifier).

features.name: Step of the Wind: Heightened Mobility

effects.prompt: Choose one skill to gain Expertise in.

3.name: Circle of the Land: Bonus Cantrip

items.name: Potion of Healing
items.description: Heals 2d4+2 hit points when consumed

items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
items.description: Heals 4d4+4 hit points when consumed

items.name: Potion of Superior Healing
items.description: Heals 8d4+8 hit points when consumed

items.name: Potion of Climbing
items.description: Grants a climb speed equal to walking speed for 1 hour. Stacks with similar effects only by extending duration.

items.name: Potion of Animal Friendship
items.description: Cast Animal Friendship (save DC 13) for 1 hour when consumed.

items.name: Potion of Growth
items.description: Enlarge effect (as the Enlarge/Reduce spell, enlarge option) for 1d4 hours when consumed.

items.name: Potion of Heroism
items.description: Grants 10 temporary hit points and the effects of Bless (no concentration required) for 1 hour.

items.name: Potion of Mind Reading
items.description: Cast Detect Thoughts (save DC 13) for 10 minutes when consumed.

items.name: Potion of Resistance
items.description: Resistance to one damage type (acid, cold, fire, force, lightning, necrotic, poison, psychic, radiant, or thunder) chosen at consume time, for 1 hour.

items.name: Potion of Water Breathing
items.description: Grants the ability to breathe water for 1 hour when consumed.

items.name: Potion of Fire Breath
items.description: After consuming, use a bonus action to exhale fire at a target within 30 ft for 4d6 fire damage (DC 13 DEX save for half), up to three times within 1 hour. The potion's effect ends after the third exhale or when the hour passes.

items.name: Potion of Hill Giant Strength
items.description: STR becomes 21 for 1 hour when consumed. No effect if the consumer's STR is already 21 or higher.

items.name: Oil of Slipperiness
items.description: Coats a creature or a 10-ft-square surface. On a creature, grants the effect of the Freedom of Movement spell for 8 hours. On a surface, the area is difficult terrain and creatures within must succeed on DC 10 DEX save or fall prone, for 8 hours.

items.name: Potion of Invisibility
items.description: Become invisible for 1 hour when consumed; effect ends early if the consumer attacks or casts a spell.

items.name: Potion of Flying
items.description: Gain a flying speed equal to the consumer's walking speed for 1 hour. Falls if still aloft when the effect ends.

items.name: Potion of Speed
items.description: Gain the effect of the Haste spell for 1 minute when consumed, no concentration required.

items.name: Oil of Sharpness
items.description: Coats a piercing or slashing weapon (or up to 5 pieces of ammunition); the weapon gains +3 to attack and damage rolls and is treated as magical for 1 hour.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Fire Bolt
items.description: Common spell scroll. Cast Fire Bolt (cantrip) with a spell attack bonus of +5; scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 10 INT or WIS check (consumer choice) to read.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Magic Missile
items.description: Common spell scroll. Cast Magic Missile at 1st level; scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 11 INT or WIS check to read.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Misty Step
items.description: Uncommon spell scroll. Cast Misty Step at 2nd level; scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 12 INT or WIS check to read.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Fireball
items.description: Uncommon spell scroll. Cast Fireball at 3rd level (save DC 15); scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 13 INT or WIS check to read.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Greater Invisibility
items.description: Rare spell scroll. Cast Greater Invisibility at 4th level (concentration, 1 minute); scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 14 INT or WIS check to read.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Cone of Cold
items.description: Rare spell scroll. Cast Cone of Cold at 5th level (save DC 17); scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 15 INT or WIS check to read.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Disintegrate
items.description: Very rare spell scroll. Cast Disintegrate at 6th level (save DC 17); scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 16 INT or WIS check to read.

items.name: Spell Scroll of Wish
items.description: Legendary spell scroll. Cast Wish at 9th level (the spell carries its own risk clauses); scroll crumbles after a single use. Non-class-list casters must succeed on a DC 19 INT or WIS check to read; on a failure, the spell ends and the scroll is destroyed without effect.

items.name: Potion of Stone Giant Strength
items.description: STR becomes 23 for 1 hour when consumed. No effect if the consumer's STR is already 23 or higher.

items.name: Potion of Frost Giant Strength
items.description: STR becomes 23 for 1 hour when consumed. No effect if the consumer's STR is already 23 or higher.

items.name: Potion of Fire Giant Strength
items.description: STR becomes 25 for 1 hour when consumed. No effect if the consumer's STR is already 25 or higher.

items.name: Potion of Cloud Giant Strength
items.description: STR becomes 27 for 1 hour when consumed. No effect if the consumer's STR is already 27 or higher.

items.name: Potion of Storm Giant Strength
items.description: STR becomes 29 for 1 hour when consumed. No effect if the consumer's STR is already 29 or higher.

items.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection and Location

conditions.name: Shielded
conditions.description: +5 bonus to AC until the start of the caster's next turn (Shield spell).

conditions.name: Aided
conditions.description: +5 to hit point maximum for the duration (Aid spell).

conditions.name: Guided
conditions.description: May add 1d4 to one ability check; consumed on use (Guidance spell).

conditions.name: Dodging
conditions.description: Until the start of your next turn, attacks against you have disadvantage and you have advantage on Dexterity saving throws (Dodge action).

conditions.name: Divine Favor Active
conditions.description: +1d4 radiant damage on every weapon hit while concentrating on Divine Favor.

conditions.name: Searing Smite Active
conditions.description: Caster's next weapon hit deals +1d6 fire damage; the spell ends after that hit.

conditions.name: Wrathful Smite Active
conditions.description: Caster's next weapon hit deals +1d6 psychic damage; the spell ends after that hit.

conditions.name: Thunderous Smite Active
conditions.description: Caster's next weapon hit deals +2d6 thunder damage; the spell ends after that hit.

conditions.name: Branding Smite Active
conditions.description: Caster's next weapon hit deals +2d6 radiant damage; the spell ends after that hit.

conditions.name: Aura of Courage Active
conditions.description: Frightened immunity granted by a nearby Paladin's L10+ Aura of Courage.

conditions.name: Heroic
conditions.description: Immune to Frightened while concentrating on Heroism. The per-turn temp HP grant fires via engine.plan.tickRecurring at the start of each target's turn (not stored on this condition).

conditions.name: Earthbound
conditions.description: Flying speed reduced to 0. If the target is airborne when the spell is cast, they fall (consumer applies the descent / falling damage).

conditions.name: Flying
conditions.description: Gains a flying speed of 60 ft for the duration. The engine's `getEffectiveSpeed` planner currently reads `character.speedFeet` (walking) directly and doesn't consume `ModifySpeed` effects from features or conditions; this entry ships as discoverable metadata so consumers can read 'fly 60 ft' from the effect stack.

conditions.name: Feather Falling
conditions.description: Falling damage is reduced to 0 (RAW: rate of descent slows to 60 ft/round, the creature lands on its feet, and takes no falling damage). The engine.plan.falling planner short-circuits to no events when this condition is present on the falling character.

conditions.name: Spider Climbing
conditions.description: Gains a climb speed equal to walking speed; can move along vertical surfaces and ceilings hands-free. Approximated as 30 ft climb speed (typical walking speed); the engine's speed planner doesn't yet read this effect into movement calculations.

conditions.name: Hexed
conditions.description: Whenever the hex caster hits the bearer with an attack, the bearer takes an extra 1d6 necrotic damage. RAW also gives the caster Disadvantage on one chosen ability check (nested sub-choice not modeled; consumer carries the ability name out-of-band). Concentration up to 1 hour. The damage rider fires via OnEvent + AddDamage with a target-side filter that matches `event.targetIsSelf && event.hit && event.attackerIsSource` — `attackerIsSource` is true when the AttackRolled's attacker matches this AppliedCondition's sourceCharacterId.

conditions.name: Cursed: Ability Score Disadvantage
conditions.description: The caster chose one ability score at cast time; while Cursed, the target has Disadvantage on ability checks and saves made with that ability. The chosen ability isn't represented in the condition itself (the engine's casterChoosesVariant primitive is flat; a nested sub-choice for the specific ability isn't modeled), so the consumer carries the ability name out-of-band and enforces the disadvantage on checks/saves.

conditions.name: Cursed: Attack Disadvantage
conditions.description: While Cursed, the target has Disadvantage on attack rolls against the caster. Wired via the SetAdvantageVsSource effect (slice 96), which reads the bearing applied condition's `sourceCharacterId` and only contributes disadvantage to attack rolls whose target equals that source.

conditions.name: Cursed: Inactive Turn
conditions.description: While Cursed, the target must make a Wisdom saving throw at the start of each of its turns against the curse caster's spell DC. On a failed save, it wastes its action that turn. The consumer calls `engine.plan.tickRecurringSave({ targetId, conditionId: 'cursed-inert-active' })` at the start of the bearer's turn while the curse holds; the planner emits SaveRolled + (on fail, when in encounter) ActionEconomyConsumed action.

conditions.name: Cursed: Extra Damage
conditions.description: While Cursed, the caster's attacks deal an extra 1d8 Necrotic damage to the bearer. Wired via OnEvent + AddDamage with the same target-side, source-filtered shape as Hex (slice 88). The 'and spells' half of the RAW text isn't auto-wired — only AttackRolled events fire the rider; spell damage doesn't trigger an OnEvent of this shape today.

conditions.name: Held (Paralyzed)
conditions.description: The spell-bound variant of Paralyzed applied by Hold Person and Hold Monster. Same mechanical effects as the bare Paralyzed condition (speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves) plus a Wisdom save at the end of each of the bearer's turns against the caster's spell DC; on success, the spell ends on the target. The consumer calls `engine.plan.tickRecurringSave({ targetId, conditionId: 'held-paralyzed-active' })` at the end of the bearer's turn while the spell holds.

conditions.name: Hideous Laughter
conditions.description: The target falls Prone and is Incapacitated for the spell's duration, unable to stand up. At the end of each of its turns it makes a Wisdom save against the caster's spell DC; on success, the spell ends on it. The RAW 'extra save with advantage when damaged' branch is not modeled — only the end-of-turn save is wired. Bare Prone + Incapacitated currently carry empty mechanical effects in the pack, so this condition is also effects-empty; the recurring save is the load-bearing wire.

conditions.name: Confused
conditions.description: The target rolls on the Confusion behavior table at the start of each of its turns and acts per that result. The behavior table itself is not modeled (would need a planner-level action overrider). What IS wired is the end-of-turn Wisdom save against the caster's spell DC; on success the spell ends on the target.

conditions.name: Bear's Endurance
conditions.description: Advantage on Constitution checks while the spell lasts. RAW also grants 2d6 temp HP at cast; that one-shot temp-HP grant isn't fired yet because the multi-mechanic shape doesn't condition a temp-hp mechanic on the buff variant chosen.

conditions.name: Bull's Strength
conditions.description: Advantage on Strength checks while the spell lasts. RAW also doubles carrying capacity; carrying capacity isn't modeled by the engine, so that's consumer-side.

conditions.name: Cat's Grace
conditions.description: Advantage on Dexterity checks while the spell lasts. RAW also grants no falling damage from falls of 20 feet or less; the engine's GrantFallingProtection effect is currently unconditional (Feather Fall semantics), and a distance-gated variant isn't modeled — so this conditional protection is consumer-side for now.

conditions.name: Eagle's Splendor
conditions.description: Advantage on Charisma checks while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Fox's Cunning
conditions.description: Advantage on Intelligence checks while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Owl's Wisdom
conditions.description: Advantage on Wisdom checks while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Commanded: Approach
conditions.description: Compelled to move toward the caster by the shortest, most direct route on its next turn, ending its turn within 5 ft of the caster. Pure narrative on the engine side — movement compulsion isn't modeled; consumers enforce the path and end-turn-when-adjacent rule, then remove this condition at end of target's next turn.

conditions.name: Commanded: Drop
conditions.description: Compelled to drop whatever it's holding and end its turn on its next turn. Pure narrative on the engine side — equipment-drop isn't a state the engine models; consumers enforce the drop + end-turn behavior, then remove this condition.

conditions.name: Commanded: Flee
conditions.description: Compelled to spend its turn moving away from the caster by the fastest available means. Pure narrative on the engine side — movement compulsion isn't modeled; consumers enforce the flee path, then remove this condition at end of target's next turn.

conditions.name: Emotion Suppressed
conditions.description: Immune to Charmed and Frightened for the duration. RAW also ends any existing Charmed / Frightened on application; the engine doesn't auto-strip them yet (the consumer can emit ConditionRemoved if desired).

conditions.name: Emotionally Indifferent
conditions.description: Indifferent toward creatures of the caster's choice that the target was Hostile toward; the indifference ends if the target takes damage or witnesses an ally being harmed. Pure narrative on the engine side — creature-vs-creature relationships and 'witnesses ally damaged' triggers aren't modeled; consumers track hostility lists and end the condition manually.

conditions.name: Enlarged
conditions.description: Size category increases by one (Medium → Large). Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saves. RAW also adds 1d4 to weapon damage; that on-hit damage rider isn't modeled yet (would need a per-attack damage-die addition similar to Holy Weapon's static add, but variable). Size category itself is consumer-side flavor; the engine doesn't model sizes.

conditions.name: Reduced
conditions.description: Size category decreases by one (Medium → Small). Disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saves. RAW also subtracts 1d4 (min 1) from weapon damage; that on-hit damage rider isn't modeled yet. Size category itself is consumer-side flavor.

conditions.name: Shielded by Faith
conditions.description: +2 bonus to AC while concentration on Shield of Faith holds.

conditions.name: Bark-Skinned
conditions.description: AC can't be lower than 17 regardless of armor (the floor bumps natural AC if it would otherwise be lower).

conditions.name: Hasted
conditions.description: Walking speed doubled, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, one extra action that can be used to Attack (one weapon attack only), Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object.

conditions.name: Blurred
conditions.description: Attackers have disadvantage on attack rolls against the blurred creature (the spell's RAW exemption for blindsight / truesight / blindness isn't modeled).

conditions.name: Pass without Trace Active
conditions.description: +10 bonus to Stealth checks while the spell lasts. The 30-ft aura range is consumer-tracked; the caster lists allies in their cast intent and the buff applies to each.

conditions.name: Absorb Elements (Acid)
conditions.description: Next melee weapon attack on the caster's next turn deals an extra 1d6 acid damage on hit; the condition is consumed after firing. RAW slot-level scaling (+1d6 per slot above 1st) isn't modeled — the dice are hardcoded as 1d6 in this condition.

conditions.name: Absorb Elements (Cold)
conditions.description: Next melee weapon attack on the caster's next turn deals an extra 1d6 cold damage on hit; the condition is consumed after firing. Slot-level scaling not modeled (see acid variant).

conditions.name: Absorb Elements (Fire)
conditions.description: Next melee weapon attack on the caster's next turn deals an extra 1d6 fire damage on hit; the condition is consumed after firing. Slot-level scaling not modeled (see acid variant).

conditions.name: Absorb Elements (Lightning)
conditions.description: Next melee weapon attack on the caster's next turn deals an extra 1d6 lightning damage on hit; the condition is consumed after firing. Slot-level scaling not modeled (see acid variant).

conditions.name: Absorb Elements (Thunder)
conditions.description: Next melee weapon attack on the caster's next turn deals an extra 1d6 thunder damage on hit; the condition is consumed after firing. Slot-level scaling not modeled (see acid variant).

conditions.name: Spirit Shroud: Cold
conditions.description: Caster's weapon attacks deal +1d8 cold damage on hit, and the target can't regain HP until the start of the caster's next turn. RAW gates the damage on the target being within 10 ft of the caster — not modeled, the rider fires on every hit (broader than RAW). Slot-level scaling (+1d8 per slot above 3rd, up to +7d8 at slot 9) isn't baked into the condition definition. The heal-block applies via an ApplyCondition TriggerAction (`durationRounds: 1`) that stamps `healing-blocked-active` on the hit target; inside an active encounter the engine auto-expires the condition at the start of the caster's next turn via `planAdvanceTurn` (slice 102). Outside an encounter the consumer manages the expiry.

conditions.name: Spirit Shroud: Necrotic
conditions.description: Caster's weapon attacks deal +1d8 necrotic damage on hit, and the target can't regain HP until the start of the caster's next turn. Same shape as the cold variant (see cold variant description for the RAW range gate and slot scaling caveats).

conditions.name: Spirit Shroud: Radiant
conditions.description: Caster's weapon attacks deal +1d8 radiant damage on hit, and the target can't regain HP until the start of the caster's next turn. Same shape as the cold variant (see cold variant description).

conditions.name: Holy Weapon Active
conditions.description: Caster's weapon attacks deal +2d8 radiant damage on hit while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Protection from Energy: Acid
conditions.description: Resistance to Acid damage while the spell lasts. One of the five Protection from Energy variants picked by the caster at cast time. The resistance flows through the existing mitigateDamage pipeline (slice 95 ships the content only; GrantResistance with a specific damageType was already supported by the engine).

conditions.name: Protection from Energy: Cold
conditions.description: Resistance to Cold damage while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Protection from Energy: Fire
conditions.description: Resistance to Fire damage while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Protection from Energy: Lightning
conditions.description: Resistance to Lightning damage while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Protection from Energy: Thunder
conditions.description: Resistance to Thunder damage while the spell lasts.

conditions.name: Healing Blocked
conditions.description: Bearer cannot regain hit points. Heal planners consult this via the effect stack and, when set, emit Healed with amount=0 (the reducer's amount<=0 early-return makes it a no-op) plus an annotation in the Healed event's `source` field. Applied by Spirit Shroud's three variants via an ApplyCondition TriggerAction on each weapon-hit rider with `durationRounds: 1`; the dispatcher stamps `expiresOnRound = currentRound + 1` on the ConditionApplied event (when inside an active encounter), and `planAdvanceTurn` emits a `ConditionRemoved` at the start of the source caster's next turn. Outside an encounter the expiry stays consumer-managed.

conditions.name: Armor of Agathys
conditions.description: Up to 1 hour (Armor of Agathys spell): while the bearer has Temporary Hit Points, any creature that hits them with a melee attack takes 5 cold damage. The temp HP itself is granted by the spell's `temp-hp` mechanic at cast time (5 base + 5 per slot level above 1); the rider here only fires while the bearer's temp HP is > 0, gated by the slice-122 `bearer.tempHp` fact + `gt` predicate. Approximation: the engine doesn't track temp-HP provenance, so the gate fires for any temp HP the bearer holds (broader than RAW which scopes it to the AoA-granted temp HP specifically). Slice 123 added the `event.attackKind` fact, so the rider now correctly gates on melee-only attacks; thrown weapons (dagger, handaxe) still classify as melee here since the engine doesn't track thrown-vs-melee-strike intent.

conditions.name: Fire Shield: Warm
conditions.description: Caster has Resistance to Cold damage, and any creature that hits caster with a melee attack takes 2d8 fire damage. RAW also gates the retaliation on 'within 5 ft of you'; the engine doesn't model the 5-ft gate consistently so the rider fires on every melee hit to the bearer (slightly broader than RAW). Slice 123 added the `event.attackKind` melee gate. Picked at cast time when the caster chooses the 'warm' variant of Fire Shield.

conditions.name: Fire Shield: Chill
conditions.description: Caster has Resistance to Fire damage, and any creature that hits caster with a melee attack takes 2d8 cold damage. Same RAW caveats as the warm variant (5-ft gate unmodeled). Slice 123 added the `event.attackKind` melee gate. Picked at cast time when the caster chooses the 'chill' variant of Fire Shield.

conditions.name: Mirror Image
conditions.description: Three illusory duplicates protect the bearer (PHB 2024). On each incoming weapon attack, the planner rolls a deflection d20: 6+ at 3 duplicates, 8+ at 2, 11+ at 1 redirects the attack to a duplicate with AC 10 + bearer DEX mod. A hit destroys the duplicate; a miss does nothing. When all 3 duplicates are destroyed, the condition is removed automatically. The bearer's AppliedCondition.level tracks remaining duplicates (starts at 3). Slice 124 wires planAttack + planOffHandAttack; cast-spell.ts attack-mechanic spells (Eldritch Blast etc.) don't yet consult Mirror Image (deferred, rare in practice since most attacks against the bearer are weapon attacks). Slice 127 wires the RAW vision-gate: attackers with blindsight or truesight, or attackers carrying the Blinded condition, bypass the deflection entirely. Duration 1 minute, not concentration; consumer manages duration narratively.

conditions.name: Freedom of Movement Active
conditions.description: Movement is unrestrained: immune to grappled, restrained, paralyzed. The RAW also negates difficult-terrain and movement-reducing magic; those nuances aren't enforced by the engine yet.

conditions.name: Foresight Active
conditions.description: 8-hour buff (Foresight spell): advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws; attackers have disadvantage. The RAW 'can't be surprised' clause is consumer-side narrative metadata (surprise is initiative-order state, not a modeled condition).

conditions.name: Mind Blanked
conditions.description: 24-hour buff (Mind Blank spell): immune to Charmed and to psychic damage. The spell's additional RAW immunities (reading thoughts, magical scrying, emotion-detection) are narrative metadata; the engine doesn't model thought-reading or scrying detection.

conditions.name: Invulnerable
conditions.description: Concentration up to 10 minutes (Invulnerability spell): caster takes no damage from any source.

conditions.name: Blade Warded
conditions.description: Until end of next turn (Blade Ward cantrip): resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage. The `autoExpiry` field (slice 109) tells the cast-spell planner to stamp `expiresOnRound = currentRound + 1` and `expiryTrigger = 'turnEnd'` on the emitted ConditionApplied when cast inside an active encounter; `planAdvanceTurn` lifts the condition at the end of the bearer's turn in the target round. Outside an encounter the expiry stays consumer-managed.

conditions.name: Resisted
conditions.description: May add 1d4 to one saving throw; consumed on use (Resistance cantrip). Same consumer-managed shape as Guidance: no engine event fires at consume time, the consumer rolls the d4 and removes the condition.

conditions.name: Longstrider
conditions.description: +10 ft walking Speed for 1 hour (Longstrider spell). The slice-77 ModifySpeed retrofit ensures the buff flows through the movement planner's getEffectiveSpeed.

conditions.name: Darkvision
conditions.description: Darkvision out to 60 ft for 8 hours (Darkvision spell). The engine stores the sense grant on the target's effect stack; consumers expose it via the character view's senses surface.

conditions.name: Studied Target
conditions.description: Fighter has Advantage on the next attack roll against the studied creature (Studied Attacks, Fighter L13). The condition lives on the fighter with `sourceCharacterId` set to the missed creature (slice 108's `sourceFromEventTarget` flag on ApplyConditionToAttacker); SetAdvantageVsSource keys against that creature so only attacks against THAT target get the bonus. The OnEvent rider consumes the condition on the fighter's next attack against the studied creature (`event.attackerIsSelf` + `event.targetIsSource`, consumeOnTrigger), regardless of hit/miss. Known limitations: (1) RAW also expires the studying "before end of your next turn" — that time-window expiry isn't modeled (the consumer can remove the condition manually at end of turn). (2) Consecutive misses against the same target don't refresh: the second miss's class-feature OnEvent re-applies, but the ConditionApplied reducer dedupes by conditionId so the second application is a no-op while the consume rider still fires, leaving the condition gone. Most playgroups won't hit this edge case.

conditions.name: Death Ward
conditions.description: Up to 8 hours (Death Ward spell): the first time the warded creature would drop to 0 HP from damage, the damage is reduced so HP lands at 1 and this condition is removed. Every primary-damage emitter (planAttack, planCastSpell, planFalling, planOffhandAttack, planWeaponMastery Graze, planTrap, concentration-aura damage, recurring damage) consults the slice-111 `interceptFatalDamage` helper after `mitigateDamage` and emits a paired ConditionRemoved when the intercept fires. Known limitation: rider-emitted DamageApplied events from the trigger dispatcher (Sneak Attack, smite damage, Spirit Shroud rider, Fire Shield retaliation) do NOT consult the intercept — they fire before the main damage event in commit order, and if a rider alone is enough to drop the target, Death Ward stays applied and the target drops normally. A future slice can refactor the dispatcher to apply each fired trigger's events to a running draft before evaluating the next.

conditions.name: Stoneskin
conditions.description: Concentration, up to 1 hour (Stoneskin spell, SRD form): resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. Wired via the slice-112 `qualifier: 'nonmagical'` field on GrantResistance: every emitter that consults `mitigateDamage` passes a `sourceIsMagical` flag, and the resistance check honors the qualifier. Weapon attacks with `temporaryBuff` set (Magic Weapon / Elemental Weapon) count as magical and bypass the resistance; spell-sourced damage is always magical. Note: the 2024 PHB Stoneskin dropped the qualifier; this entry follows the SRD 5.2 shape to exercise the primitive. The same `qualifier` field unblocks the common MM trait 'resistance to B/P/S damage from nonmagical attacks' on future monster authoring. Known limitation: rider-emitted damage from the trigger dispatcher (Sneak Attack, smites, Spirit Shroud, Fire Shield) bypasses `mitigateDamage` entirely and therefore also bypasses the qualifier — pre-existing dispatcher quirk separate from this slice.

conditions.name: Sanctuary
conditions.description: Up to 1 minute (Sanctuary spell): any creature that targets the warded creature with an attack roll or a harmful spell must first make a WIS save against the caster's spell DC. The consumer rolls the attacker's save via `engine.plan.sanctuaryWardSave({ attackerId, wardedCharacterId })` before invoking the attack planner; on a failed save the planner emits a `SanctuaryProtected` event and the consumer drops the attack. The spell ends when the bearer makes an attack roll (modeled here via an OnEvent rider with consumeOnTrigger). RAW also ends the spell when the bearer casts a harmful spell or deals damage to another creature; those vectors aren't modeled today (the dispatcher has no `castDeclared-with-hostile-target` or `dealtDamage` fact).

conditions.name: Protection from Evil and Good
conditions.description: Aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead have disadvantage on attack rolls against the bearer (Protection from Evil and Good spell). The disadvantage gate is enforced via a type-conditional ImposeDisadvantageOnAttackers whose predicate reads `attackerCreatureType` from facts the attack planner supplies. The bearer is also immune to charmed and frightened *from those same six types*; slice 104 added a source-predicate to GrantConditionImmunity so isImmuneToCondition (called from the cast-spell save and buff branches and from the concentration aura tick) gates the immunity on the casting source's creatureType matching the six warded types. The RAW 'possessed' clause isn't modeled (the engine doesn't carry a possessed condition). The shared range / duration distinction with Magic Circle lives on the spell entry, not the condition.

conditions.name: Magic Circle
conditions.description: 10-foot cylinder ward (Magic Circle spell): creatures of the warded type have disadvantage on attack rolls against creatures inside the circle, and can't charm or frighten them. Shares the disadvantage + condition-immunity shape with Protection from Evil and Good (same six creature types — aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, undead). RAW lets the caster name a single creature type at cast time; the engine doesn't model the caster choice yet, so the condition wards against all six (broader than RAW for non-fiend casts). The RAW positional constraint (only applies while the warded creature is inside the 10-foot cylinder) is consumer-territory.

conditions.name: Holy Aura
conditions.description: Concentration up to 1 minute (Holy Aura spell): bearer has advantage on saving throws (universal), all attack rolls against the bearer have disadvantage (universal), and any Fiend or Undead that hits the bearer with a melee attack is blinded via an OnEvent rider gated on the attacker's creature type. RAW gates the blind on a failed CON save and on the attack being melee; neither gate is enforced today (the dispatcher doesn't have an attackKind fact, and ApplyCondition TriggerActions don't roll a save). The auto-expiry of the blinded condition rides slice 102's `durationRounds`-to-`expiresOnRound` plumbing.

conditions.name: Aura of Protection Active
conditions.description: CHA-modifier bonus to all saves (min +1) granted by a nearby Paladin's L6+ Aura of Protection. The bonus reads the source Paladin's CHA score via the AppliedCondition sourceCharacterId link.

conditions.name: Crusader's Mantle Active
conditions.description: +1d4 radiant damage on every weapon hit while the spell lasts.
